description: Calculate estimated annual property tax revenue by zone for San Francisco and analyze fiscal productivity using the UrbanSim dataset. Using the notebook at /home/ga/urbansim_projects/notebooks/tax_revenue_analysis.ipynb and data from /home/ga/urbansim_projects/data/sanfran_public.h5, compute the estimated annual tax (1.17% rate) and tax per acre for each planning zone. The analysis must exclude buildings with missing or zero sales prices and handle missing parcel acreage using a conversion of 4046.86 square meters per acre. Export a zone-level summary table (including zone_id, total_assessed_value, estimated_annual_tax, num_buildings, total_acres, and tax_per_acre) sorted descending by tax revenue to /home/ga/urbansim_projects/output/zone_tax_revenue.csv. Additionally, save a horizontal bar chart of the top 15 zones titled "Top 15 Zones by Estimated Annual Property Tax Revenue" to /home/ga/urbansim_projects/output/tax_revenue_top_zones.png. The final executed notebook should display citywide totals and the top/bottom 5 zones by tax productivity.
